title: Representations of relative Cohn path algebras
abstract: We study relative Cohn path algebras, also known as Leavitt-Cohn path algebras, and we realize them as partial skew group rings (to do this we prove uniqueness theorems for relative Cohn path algebras). Furthermore, given any graph $E$ we define $E$-relative branching systems and prove how they induce representations of the associated relative Cohn path algebra. We give necessary and sufficient conditions for faithfulness of the representations associated to $E$-relative branching systems (this improves previous results known to Leavitt path algebras of row-finite graphs with no sinks). To prove this last result we show first a version, for relative Cohn-path algebras, of the reduction theorem for Leavitt path algebras.
comment: 20 pages; revised version; to appear in Journal of Pure and Applied Algebra
